subject: Rowlet, the grass/flying owl Pokemon, wings spread in a leafy green setting
description: A single Rowlet is depicted in a mid-shot against a bright green background filled with large leaf shapes. The round-bodied owl Pokemon has its wings spread wide, facing forward with a calm, slightly quizzical expression. Its distinctive bow-tie chest marking and large eyes are clearly visible. The color palette is dominated by greens with warm accents on the creature's brown and cream plumage. The mood is cheerful and light.
foreground: Rowlet with wings spread wide, round body, bow-tie chest marking visible
background: Dense leafy green foliage, bright and lush
emotion: calm and curious, large eyes open, wings spread in relaxed display
